channel.title: Running a Tower
channel.description: Recent content on Running a Tower

item.title: Agenda
item.description: Site currently under construction Draft Agenda # The following is an annotated draft of an agenda. A version of this, without the annotation, can be downloaded from here as a pdf file or as a word document. Agenda for Annual Meeting of XXXX ringers at XXXX on DATE at TIME # Prayers and opening remarks. # Prayers are probably only relevant if the tower is part of a religious institution.

item.title: Planning
item.description: Site currently under construction Planning ringing # Timing # Not all ringers will arrive on time. Allow for greeting, hanging up coats, etc. Bells may have to be raised and lowered which may take up to 15 minutes. If the session is 90 minutes long, this allows 75 minutes to achieve aims. These should give everyone at least one piece of useful and satisfying ringing. 120 changes of Doubles or Minor takes 4-5 minutes.
